# Allowlist of paths to mirror from the private repo to evoila/meho.
#
# Used by .github/workflows/mirror-to-public.yml as an rsync --files-from list.
# One path per line, relative to the repo root. Lines starting with `#` and
# blank lines are ignored.
#
# Whitelist semantics: ONLY paths listed here ship to the public repo.
# Anything not listed is stripped by default. When adding a new top-level
# file or directory to the repo, decide whether it is public and add it here
# if so. Do not edit the mirror workflow itself for routine additions.
#
# Directories are mirrored recursively.

# Product source
meho_app
meho_frontend
meho_mcp_server

# Tests and fixtures
tests
samplespecs

# Docs and developer materials
docs
scripts
config
docker

# CI, hooks, quality tooling
.github
.githooks
.codecov.yml
.coveragerc
.pre-commit-config.yaml
.semgrepignore
sonar-project.properties

# Build + dependency manifests
pyproject.toml
uv.lock
pytest.ini
Makefile
mkdocs.yml

# Runtime compose + nginx
docker-compose.yml
docker-compose.override.yml
docker-compose.test.yml
nginx.conf
nginx.conf.template

# Kubernetes deployment artifacts
deploy/helm

# Repo hygiene files
.gitignore
.dockerignore

# Example env files (no secrets)
env.example
.env.connectors.example

# Top-level docs shipped to the community
AGENTS.md
CLAUDE.md
README.md
LICENSE
CONTRIBUTING.md
CLA.md
SECURITY.md
CHANGELOG.md
COVERAGE-DEBT.md

# License inventories + dead-code tooling
npm-licenses.csv
python-licenses.csv
vulture_whitelist.py
